Under the 2026 CBA, what is the exact Salary Cap figure for the 2026 Salary Cap Year, and what is the maximum percentage by which the 2027 Salary Cap may increase or decrease from it? (Art. VII, Sec. 1(a))

Under Art. V, Sec. 3(b), what is the maximum number of Player Contracts containing Base Salary protection of any kind that a Team may have at one time, and which of the following correctly states an exception to that limit?
Under Art. V, Sec. 4(e), for a Rookie Scale Contract signed by a First Round Pick selected 'in the Lottery,' when does the Base Salary for the second Season become fully protected?
Under Art. V, Sec. 3(g), which of the following correctly describes a restriction on trade bonuses introduced in the 2026 CBA?
Under Art. VI, Sec. 7, regarding Core Player designations, which of the following is an accurate statement about the new 2026 CBA rules?
Under Art. VI, Sec. 6(d), what is the First Refusal Exercise Notice Deadline for a ROFR Team after receiving an Offer Sheet from a Restricted Free Agent?

Under Art. X, Sec. 1(a), what is the in-network annual deductible per covered individual under the WNBA medical plan for non-Toronto Tempo players, and at what out-of-pocket threshold does coverage reach 100% in-network?
Under Art. XIV, Sec. 7, what is the maximum aggregate fine that can be imposed on a player for missing Regular Season games in a single Season, and what is the per-game maximum fine percentage?
True or False: Under Art. VII, Sec. 1(c), the Minimum Team Salary for any Salary Cap Year is set at eighty percent (80%) of the Salary Cap for that year.

True or False: Under Art. XI, Sec. 1(a), beginning with the 2029 Season all players (not Developmental Players) regardless of salary level are entitled to Team-provided one-bedroom apartments in their home city.
Under Art. V, Sec. 3(g), which of the following players is PROHIBITED from having a trade bonus included in her Contract or Extension under the 2026 CBA?
Under Art. V, Sec. 4(e), for a Rookie Scale Contract signed by a Second Round Pick, which of the following correctly describes the Base Salary protection rules for the first Season of such Contract?
Under Art. V, Sec. 3(b), which of the following scenarios correctly describes an exception to the seven (7) Player Contract limit for Base Salary protection under the 2026 CBA?
Under Art. VII, Sec. 1(c), what is the Minimum Team Salary as a percentage of the Salary Cap for any Salary Cap Year under the 2026 CBA?
Under Art. VI, Sec. 7(b), which of the following players is INELIGIBLE to be designated as a Core Player during the Core Player Designation period prior to the 2026 Season?

Under Art. VI, Sec. 5(b), a Veteran Free Agent is eligible to receive a Restricted Qualifying Offer (and thereby become a Restricted Free Agent) if she has how many Years of Service, and what is the baseline salary floor for such a Restricted Qualifying Offer?

Under Art. X, Sec. 1(a), what is the out-of-network annual deductible per covered individual under the WNBA medical plan for non-Toronto Tempo players, and at what out-of-pocket threshold does out-of-network coverage reach 100%?
Under Art. XIV, Sec. 7, which of the following correctly states both the per-playoff-game maximum fine percentage and the maximum aggregate fine cap for missing playoff games in a Season?

True or False: Under Art. XI, Sec. 1(a), for the 2029 and 2030 Seasons, ALL players (who are not Developmental Players) are entitled to Team-provided one-bedroom apartments in their home city regardless of their Base Salary level.

True or False: Under Art. VIII, the Rookie Scale Amount for the first Season of a Rookie Scale Contract for the overall first pick in the 2026 WNBA Draft is $500,000, and Rookie Scale Amounts for Second Round Picks in subsequent Seasons increase by the same percentage as the Salary Cap increase rather than a fixed 4% rate.

Under Art. V, Sec. 4(e), for a Rookie Scale Contract signed by a non-Lottery First Round Pick, which of the following correctly describes when the Base Salary for the FIRST Season becomes fully protected?

Under Art. V, Sec. 3(g), what is the maximum permissible trade bonus amount as a percentage of Base Salary remaining at the time of the trade, and which of the following statements about trade bonus eligibility is CORRECT under the 2026 CBA?

Under Art. V, Sec. 3(b), which of the following correctly describes the treatment of a Rookie Scale Contract that contains Base Salary protection with respect to the per-team limit of seven (7) Player Contracts containing Base Salary protection?

Under Art. VI, Sec. 5(b), a Veteran Free Agent is eligible to receive a Restricted Qualifying Offer—and thereby become a Restricted Free Agent—if she has how many Years of Service, and what is the baseline salary floor for such an offer?

Under Art. VII, Sec. 1(c), the Minimum Team Salary for a Salary Cap Year equals what percentage of the Salary Cap, and what is the WNBA's obligation if a Team falls short of this threshold at the conclusion of a Season?
Under Art. VIII, Sec. (c), how are Rookie Scale Amounts for Second Round Picks in Seasons after the 2026 Season adjusted, and how does this differ from the adjustment rule for First Round Picks?

Under Art. XIV, Sec. 7, which of the following correctly states both the per-Regular-Season-game maximum fine percentage AND the maximum aggregate fine cap for missing Regular Season games in a Season?

Under Art. X, Sec. 1(a), for non-Toronto Tempo players, which of the following correctly states the in-network annual deductible per covered individual AND the out-of-pocket threshold at which in-network coverage reaches 100%?

True or False: Under Art. XI, Sec. 1(a), for the 2029 and 2030 Seasons, ALL players who are not Developmental Players are entitled to Team-provided one-bedroom apartments regardless of their Base Salary level.

True or False: Under Art. VI, Sec. 7(b), a player who has previously played pursuant to a Contract signed while she was designated as a Core Player by a Team is ineligible to be designated as a Core Player by that same Team during the Core Player Designation period prior to the 2026 Season.
